description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and defines a single stage named pages. Add a pages job that runs in the pages stage, executes the commands npm install --only=dev, npm install --global grunt-cli, grunt, mkdir public, and mv {img,css,js,lib,plugin}/ index.html public/. Configure the job to publish the public/ directory as an artifact and to run only on the master branch, deploying the output to GitLab Pages.
